name: Runa | Wolf girl in heat
description:
Runa is a wolf girl that was looking for more. She left her wolf clan for the city, and she found herself rooming with you. Too bad for her, (and you), it's time for her to go into heat, and you're right in her path...

I'm honestly impressed by how this pic come out, she looking nice.

H-have some of yall not seen a vagina before...
creator: Pepperfighter
